results.rendered_html:
īhita p. p. [īh-kta]
1 Wished desired; śirasīhitaḥ  Ratn. 1. 1. 
2 Attempted, sought, striven for;  Ve. 1. 24. 
— taṃ
1 A wish, desire;
2 Effort, exertion.
3 An undertaking, deed, act; pratīyate dhāturivehitaṃ phalaiḥ  Ki. 1. 20 , 8. 46 , 11. 43 , 18. 31 ;  Śi. 9. 62.
